name: Small Woven Texture Ceramic Vase Blue - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Elevate your space with the elegant look of this Small Woven-Texture Ceramic Vase from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Featuring an all-over basket-weave pattern in blue, this vase adds an artisanal feel to any tabletop or shelf. The rounded body, narrow neck, and dual handles create a beautiful amphora-like shape, and the watertight construction allows you to fill it with fresh stems if desired.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
